---
id: activity
title: "Report document activity"
description: "Report user activity that occurs on indexed documents such as viewing or editing. This signal improves search quality."
sidebar_label: "Report document activity"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/activity/glean-api-activity

---
